generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values national security and understands the complexities of global threats, I'm glad to see our leaders pushing for strategic autonomy. It's not about isolation—it's about ensuring we can protect our interests when allies might not always be available. The recent cyber-attacks on critical infrastructure show why this isn't just a theoretical debate. We need to reduce uncertainty and prepare for the worst while maintaining our civil liberties. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
